columns.player_id: canonical gsis_id -- ALREADY the crosswalk key, verified 2026-07-18; no join needed
columns.team: NFL team abbreviation for that game
columns.target_share: player targets / team pass attempts -- matches phase1 §5's target_share metric directly
columns.wopr: weighted opportunity rating -- nflverse's own version of phase1 §5's weighted_opportunity metric
columns.fantasy_points_ppr: nflverse's OWN ppr scoring assumption -- NOT verified to match this league's exact settings (charter §5: 4pt passing TD); don't treat as this league's PPG without checking get_league_scoring()
145 columns total from nflreadpy's load_player_stats(); most of the rest are position-specific (K/DST/IDP) counting stats out of charter scope (§4) but kept as-pulled since raw data is never filtered
